creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Mon, 20 Sep 1999 04:15:57 -0400
From: W Gerald Hicks <wghicks@bellsouth.net>
To: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.org
Cc: wghicks@bellsouth.net
Subject: Re: ports/13745: [NEW PORT] wamcc - prolog-to-c compiler 


Create "wamcc" subdirectories in /usr/local/{include,lib} instead
of polluting those directories with the libraries and headers from
this port.

This will be necessary to allow coexistence with a forthcoming
clp_fd port.

The following tarball is an amended copy of the original, it
should be used instead of the original submission.

Cheers,

Jerry Hicks
wghicks@bellsouth.net

*-----------------------------------------------------------*
begin 644 wamcc.tgz
